assertions.description: The panelized board has footprint_count 1207 which is approximately 8× the single board count (151), consistent with an 8-up panel (2×4 or similar array). The board dimensions (100.56 × 203.16 mm) correspond to a standard panel size. The net count (102) matches the single board, confirming the panel uses the same netlist.

The panelized PCB is intentionally not fully routed (the panel stitching and v-score tracks may be excluded from the ratsnest). The 39 unrouted_net_count is expected for a panelized design where the panelizer may not route inter-board connections. Zone count 24 (vs 3 in single board) reflects the replicated copper pours across 8 copies.
